name: LRCLIB Lyrics
author: danielbanariba
description: Fetches synced (LRC) and plain lyrics from LRCLIB (lrclib.net), with KVStore caching.

http.reason: Fetch lyrics from the LRCLIB public API.

kvstore.reason: Cache fetched lyrics so repeated lookups are instant (LRCLIB is slow, ~7-10s per request).
